{{Missing Info|specifics=<br>Source}}

{{CargoRelic
|name=Catherine II Portrait
|class_id=22697
|rank=SSS
|affct=FTH
|birthday=11-16
|source=
|description=The portrait of Catherine II was created on November 16, 1780.<br>Catherine II was the twelfth Tsarina of the Romanov Dynasty and the eighth Empress of the Russian Empire. During her reign, Russia became a powerful nation in Europe. In this portrait, this outstanding monarch is depicted in magnificent royal attire, wearing a crown and holding a scepter.
|fame=61
|art=75
|fth=108
|civ=47
|tech=70
|ss1=Angel Minion RUSH +3%<br>All minion skins DEF +10%<br>Per 2,000 Forest Sanctum Rating Pts, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +24<br>Forest Sanctum Rating Pts: 100,000/100,000
|ss2=Angel Minion RUSH +4%<br>All minion skins DEF +20%<br>Per 2,000 Forest Sanctum Rating Pts, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +32<br>Forest Sanctum Rating Pts: 100,000/100,000
|ss3=Angel Minion RUSH +5%<br>All minion skins DEF +30%<br>Per 2,000 Forest Sanctum Rating Pts, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +40<br>Forest Sanctum Rating Pts: 100,000/100,000
|ss4=Angel Minion RUSH +7%<br>All minion skins DEF +50%<br>Per 2,000 Forest Sanctum Rating Pts, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +56<br>Forest Sanctum Rating Pts: 100,000/100,000
|ss5=Angel Minion RUSH +9%<br>All minion skins DEF +70%<br>Per 2,000 Forest Sanctum Rating Pts, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +72<br>Forest Sanctum Rating Pts: 100,000/100,000
|ss6=Angel Minion RUSH +12%<br>All minion skins DEF +100%<br>Per 2,000 Forest Sanctum Rating Pts, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +96<br>Forest Sanctum Rating Pts: 100,000/100,000
|ss7=Angel Minion RUSH +12%<br>All minion skins DEF +100%<br>Per 2,000 Forest Sanctum Rating Pts, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +96<br>Forest Sanctum Rating Pts: 100,000/100,000<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 800 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Dragon Orb Drops +3%
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's FTH +15
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x INTEL Drops +6%
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Reformation Dawn|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +5|orange}}
|3name=Imperial Guard|3rec=253.95M|3atk=631384|3def=391036|3hp=177374070|3weak=62747
|4name=Peter III|4rec=385.04M|4atk=810740|4def=508967|4hp=339304653|4weak=69652
|5name=Elizabeth I|5rec=562.24M|5atk=1055862|5def=668386|5hp=571485492|5weak=76434
|6name=Catherine II|6rec=771.39M|6atk=1379974|6def=876819|6hp=903051564|6weak=83685
|Arec=1030.74M|Aatk=1802074|Adef=1145237|Ahp=1322277560|Aweak=91845
}}
}}

[[Category:Rift Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Rift Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Angel Minion RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Minion DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Priest-Snail Boost]]
[[Category:Protomon Boost]]
[[Category:Minion Skin Boost]]
[[Category:Minion RUSH Boost]]
